zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Langley於大約1590年出生在英國貝德福爾時，她的父親Thomas Langley43歲，母親Ann Denison39歲。她於1611年10月10日與Richard Ingersoll在英國貝德福爾桑迪結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她於1629年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。她去世於1677年7月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Langley于大约1590年出生在英国貝德福爾时，她的父亲Thomas Langley43岁，母亲Ann Denison39岁。她于1611年10月10日与Richard Ingersoll在英国貝德福爾桑迪结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她于1629年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。她去世于1677年7月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Langley was born about 1590, in Bedfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Langley, was 43 and her mother, Ann Denison, was 39. She married Richard Ingersoll on 10 October 1611, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1629. She died on 30 July 1677, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Langley est née environ 1590, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Langley, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Ann Denison, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Ingersoll le 10 octobre 1611, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1629. Elle est décédée le 30 juillet 1677, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 88 ans.

Sie starb am 30. Juli 1677 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Langley è nata il circa 1590 nel Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Langley, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Ann Denison, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Richard Ingersoll il 10 ottobre 1611, nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Immigrata nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1629. Morì il 30 luglio 1677, nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Langleyが約1590年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Langleyは43歳，母Ann Denisonは39歳であった。1611年10月10日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディでRichard Ingersollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1629年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住した。彼女は1677年7月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムで88歳で死去した。

ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Langley(이)가 대략 1590년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Langley(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Denison(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1611년 10월 10일 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 Richard Ingersoll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1677년 7월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Langley nasceu aproximadamente 1590, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Langley, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Ann Denison, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Ingersoll em 10 de outubro de 1611, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1629. Ela faleceu em 30 de julho de 1677, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Langley родилась около 1590 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Langley было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Denison, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Ingersoll 10 октября 1611 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она иммигрировала в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1629 году. Она умерла 30 июля 1677 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Langley nació aproximadamente 1590, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Langley, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Ann Denison, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Richard Ingersoll el 10 de octubre de 1611, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1629. Murió el 30 de julio de 1677, en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 88 años.
